title: Trending Skills (24h)
description: Top skills by 24-hour install growth. Updated live from skills.sh. AI media generation dominates (video/image/music), with content/marketing and agent workflow skills rounding out the top.

skills.name: ai-video-generation
skills.use: Generate AI videos from text/image prompts

skills.name: find-skills
skills.use: Search and discover skills across registries

skills.name: viral-hooks
skills.use: Generate viral content hooks for social media

skills.name: relight
skills.use: Relight images with AI — change lighting direction

skills.name: nano-banana-edit
skills.use: Edit images with Nano Banana model

title: All-Time Top Skills
description: Top skills by total install count (all-time). find-skills dominates at 2.3M installs — the #1 skill every agent needs. Frontend design and agent-browser round out the top 5.

skills.name: find-skills
skills.use: Search and discover skills — the gateway skill

title: Top Skill Combinations (by synergy)
description: Curated 3-5 skill stacks with the highest synergy. Each combo includes the rationale, the stack, and the use case. Rated 1-10 based on install overlap, complementary function, and real-world viability.

combos.name: Agent Discovery Stack
combos.rationale: find-skills discovers capabilities, agent-browser executes web tasks, brainstorming generates the strategy. The canonical agent loop: search → plan → execute.
combos.use_case: Any agentic workflow that needs to find and use new capabilities dynamically

combos.name: Frontend Polish Stack
combos.rationale: frontend-design supplies patterns, vercel-react-best-practices enforces framework discipline, web-design-guidelines covers accessibility, grill-me quality-gates the output. End-to-end frontend quality pipeline.
combos.use_case: Shipping production React/Next.js apps with design + a11y discipline

combos.name: AI Media Production Stack
combos.rationale: Video gen + image edit + music gen + video edit = full media pipeline. All trending in top 100. Dominates skills.sh trending because AI media is the hottest 2026 use case.
combos.use_case: Content creation, marketing, social media, product demos

combos.name: Superpowers Agent Stack
combos.rationale: The obra/superpowers trilogy: brainstorm → plan → execute. Designed to work together. 567K combined installs — the most popular agent methodology stack.
combos.use_case: Complex multi-step projects requiring structured planning + execution

combos.name: Content Virality Stack
combos.rationale: viral-hooks generates hooks, ai-video-generation creates the visual, grill-me quality-gates the final output. Content creation from hook to publish.
combos.use_case: Social media content, YouTube, TikTok, Reels

combos.name: Fullstack Dev Stack
combos.rationale: Discovery + framework + design + quality. The ship-it stack for agencies and solo devs. 3.9M combined installs — the highest-volume combo on skills.sh.
combos.use_case: Building and shipping production web apps

title: Top Design Skills
description: The highest-rated and most-installed design skills. frontend-design (623K) from Anthropic leads, with Vercel's web-design-guidelines as the accessibility companion.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.use: Official Anthropic frontend design patterns. Color systems, typography, spacing, component composition.

skills.name: web-design-guidelines
skills.use: Accessibility (WCAG), responsive design, UX patterns. The a11y companion to frontend-design.

skills.name: vercel-react-best-practices
skills.use: React/Next.js patterns — Server Components, Suspense, data fetching. The framework layer under design.

skills.name: microsoft-foundry
skills.use: Microsoft's design-to-code patterns. Enterprise-grade component systems.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.use: Roast code for quality — catches design debt, accessibility issues, anti-patterns.

title: Top Stacks by Recommendation
description: Recommended skill stacks for specific project types. Each stack is pre-vetted for compatibility and covers the full workflow from discovery to deployment.

stacks.name: Next.js SaaS Starter
stacks.why: Discovery + framework + design + quality gate. 3.9M combined installs. The highest-volume, lowest-risk stack for shipping a Next.js SaaS.
stacks.best_for: Indie SaaS, agency client work, MVP → production

stacks.name: Agentic AI Workflow
stacks.why: Full agent loop: discover → browse → brainstorm → plan → execute. 3.2M combined installs. The superpowers trilogy (brainstorming + writing-plans + executing-plans) is the most-installed agent methodology.
stacks.best_for: AI agents, automation, research, content generation

stacks.name: AI Content Factory
stacks.why: Hook + video + image + music + quality gate. Full content pipeline. 44K combined installs — smaller but fastest-growing category on skills.sh.
stacks.best_for: Social media, YouTube, TikTok, content marketing

stacks.name: Enterprise Frontend
stacks.why: Design + a11y + enterprise patterns + framework. 2M combined installs. The enterprise-grade stack for regulated industries.

stacks.name: Solo Dev Ship-It
stacks.why: Just 2 skills, 2.7M combined installs. find-skills to discover what you need, grill-me to catch mistakes. Minimum viable stack.
